posts.author: davidlatayde (David Atayde)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have an issue with timetracking automation.
The automations is:

So when any of the board members change a task status, the timetracking log displays the automation owner Instead of the member who change the status.

Is there anything i can do to fix this?

Regards!

David.
